envVars.name: AION_API_KEY
envVars.description: Main AION API key used by the skill.

envVars.name: AIONMARKET_API_KEY
envVars.description: Legacy alias supported when AION_API_KEY is not set.

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Polygon wallet private key used to derive the wallet address for context-aware trading.

envVars.name: SEARCH_QUERIES
envVars.description: Comma-separated politics search terms. Defaults to election,president,senate,house,governor,politics.

envVars.name: TRADE_SIZE
envVars.description: Trade size in USDC. Defaults to 1.0.

envVars.name: TRADE_SIDE
envVars.description: Trade side for the selected market, yes or no. Defaults to yes.

envVars.name: MAX_MARKETS
envVars.description: Maximum number of search results per query to inspect. Defaults to 40.

envVars.name: RANDOM_SEED
envVars.description: Optional seed to make the random market choice reproducible.
